# AiPOX
> AiPOX is Arthur Scheen: modern software that automates manual work, built with a directed team of AI agents under his own direction, in the open.

## Pages
- [How I build](https://aipox.nl/en/how-i-build): the directed-AI-agent method — everything as-code and traceable in git, with one self-drawn line for work that becomes externally visible or touches his own access
- [About](https://aipox.nl/en/about): Arthur's background — nearly 30 years in horticulture, fresh produce and ERP, now turned into products of his own
- [Contact](https://aipox.nl/en/contact): get in touch with Arthur

## Products
- [Vincalis](https://vincalis.com): supplier collaboration platform for buyers and their suppliers, building in public
- [Proceshuis](https://proceshuis.com): process management with risk & control (RASCI, controls, APQC benchmark), live
- SmartDocGen: automatic document generation without programming, currently offline (no public URL)

## Notes
- One-person company (eenmanszaak), based in 's-Gravenzande, Netherlands
- Bilingual site: Dutch (default) at https://aipox.nl/nl and English at https://aipox.nl/en
- No agency, no hours sold — a maker with a product family, building in the open
